verdict.summary: Guide is mostly solid on união de facto rights, but it contains a serious anachronistic/unsupported nationality-law update and a few legal-source/cost caveats that should be fixed.

issues.current: «03.05.2026 Президент Сегуру промульгировал Decreto AR 48/XVII (новая редакция Lei da Nacionalidade). На 13.05.2026 закон ВСЁ ЕЩЁ НЕ опубликован в DRE (10 дней с промульгации). После публикации в Diário da República минимальный срок união de facto для подачи на гражданство увеличится с 3 до 5 лет...»
issues.problem: This is outside the April 2026 legal state and contradicts the required reference point: as of April 2026 the new nationality law had been approved by Parliament on 01.04.2026 and was awaiting presidential promulgation/publication, so it was not in force. The text states later May 2026 events as fact and gives a definitive future legal effect before DRE publication. Also the “10 days from promulgation” phrasing is misleading: the relevant constitutional deadlines are about presidential promulgation/veto after receipt, not a simple rule that a law is published in DRE within 10 days of promulgation.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «На апрель 2026 действует прежняя редакция Lei da Nacionalidade: для aquisição da nacionalidade через união de facto с гражданином Португалии требуется união de facto более 3 лет и предварительное судебное признание союза. 01.04.2026 Assembleia da República одобрила изменения к Lei da Nacionalidade, но до промульгации Президентом и публикации в Diário da República они не вступают в силу. Перед подачей проверяйте актуальную редакцию Lei 37/81 в DRE и страницу IRN/Justiça.»
issues.source: Lei 37/81, art. 3; Constituição da República Portuguesa, arts. 136 and 119; DRE

issues.current: «Presidência da República — Promulgação Decreto AR 48/XVII (Lei da Nacionalidade)», lastRetrieved: «2026-05-04»
issues.problem: The source date and claimed event are after the April 2026 review point. For an April-2026 guide this source should not be used to state the law has been promulgated or will definitely enter into force in a specific form.
issues.suggestion: Use a source for the 01.04.2026 parliamentary approval/status only, and clearly mark the reform as «aprovada pela Assembleia da República, aguardando promulgação/publicação; ainda não em vigor». Keep the DRE consolidated Lei 37/81 as the controlling source until publication of an amending law.
issues.source: DRE; Assembleia da República legislative process; Lei 37/81

issues.current: «Судебное признание união de facto для гражданства», amountEURMin: 300, amountEURMax: 1200, note: «Оценка с учётом advogado и custas...»
issues.problem: The minimum of €300 including lawyer and court fees is likely unrealistically low for a civil court action to recognise união de facto for nationality. These actions normally require a lawyer in practice, and court fees plus professional fees often exceed this floor. The range may mislead readers into budgeting too little.
issues.suggestion: Change to a more cautious wording, e.g. «примерно €800–€2,500+ с advogado и custas; может быть дешевле только при apoio judiciário или очень простой ситуации. Запросите orçamento у advogado/solicitador». If you keep €300, label it as «custas/fees only, without lawyer» rather than total cost.
issues.source: Regulamento das Custas Processuais; Ordem dos Advogados practice varies

issues.current: «Семейный дом: surviving partner имеет право проживания в casa de morada de família на срок, установленный Lei 7/2001; при союзе более 5 лет срок может быть связан с длительностью союза.»
issues.problem: Legally correct in spirit but too vague for an important right. Lei 7/2001 gives a right of use of the family home and household contents for 5 years; if the união de facto lasted more than 5 years, for a period equal to the duration of the union, with possible court extension and further conditions/exceptions.
issues.suggestion: Write more precisely: «Переживший партнёр имеет direito real de habitação da casa de morada de família и direito de uso do recheio на 5 лет; если союз длился более 5 лет — на срок, равный длительности союза. Суд может продлить срок с учётом обстоятельств; есть исключения, например при наличии собственного жилья в соответствующей зоне.»

issues.current: «Иммиграция: AIMA может рассматривать parceiro em união de facto как члена семьи для reunificação familiar, если союз надёжно доказан.»
issues.problem: Correct but incomplete for non-EU expats: recognition as a family member does not remove the usual reunification requirements such as valid residence status of the sponsor, accommodation, means of subsistence and documentary proof/legalisation. Readers may think proof of união de facto alone is enough.
issues.suggestion: Add: «Но одного доказательства союза недостаточно: AIMA также проверяет право заявителя на reunificação familiar, meios de subsistência, alojamento, легализацию/перевод документов и отсутствие оснований для отказа.»
issues.source: Lei 23/2007, arts. 98–108; AIMA family reunification guidance

issues.current: «Налог: для gratuitous transfers между unidos de facto может применяться освобождение от 10% Imposto do Selo...»
issues.problem: The statement is broadly correct, but the phrase «может применяться» should be tied to the Stamp Duty Code exemption for spouse/united de facto, descendants and ascendants. It should also warn that other taxes/costs and formal title-transfer requirements may still apply depending on the asset.
issues.suggestion: Write: «По Código do Imposto do Selo gratuitous transfers в пользу unido de facto освобождаются от 10% imposto do selo, но право на актив должно возникнуть по завещанию/договору/закону, а регистрационные расходы и специальные правила для недвижимости всё равно возможны.»
issues.source: Código do Imposto do Selo, art. 6(e)

issues.current: Sources include Lei 7/2001, Justiça.gov, Lei 37/81, Justiça.gov nationality page, Presidência page only.
issues.problem: The guide makes claims about IRS, Segurança Social death benefits, labour absences, hospital/health decisions, tenancy/housing, Stamp Duty and AIMA reunification, but does not cite primary or official sources for those categories. For a legal guide, this is under-sourced.
issues.suggestion: Add official/legal sources for: Código do IRS art. 14; Segurança Social death benefits/pensão de sobrevivência pages; Código do Trabalho absence provisions; Lei 23/2007 and/or AIMA reunification guidance; Código do Imposto do Selo art. 6(e); Civil Code/New Urban Lease Regime provisions on family home/lease transmission where relevant.
issues.source: CIRS; Segurança Social; Código do Trabalho; Lei 23/2007; Código do Imposto do Selo

missing_topics: For nationality, explain that the civil-court recognition required by Lei 37/81 art. 3 is different from a Junta declaration or administrative recognition at a Conservatória.
For AIMA family reunification, list the usual non-union requirements: valid sponsor residence, accommodation, means of subsistence, legalised/translatable documents and appointment/backlog issues.
For death of a partner, mention the precise 5-year/factual-duration rule for direito real de habitação and direito de uso do recheio under Lei 7/2001.
For tax, cite Código do IRS joint taxation rules and Código do Imposto do Selo exemption rather than relying only on general wording.
For medical decisions, distinguish hospital visiting/information access from formal healthcare decision-making via Diretiva Antecipada de Vontade/procuração.
